---
title: "CDP Climate Data"
page-layout: article
---

# CDP Climate Data

## Description

Company-reported environmental and climate disclosure data covering emissions, sustainability practices, and supply-chain activity. Supports ESG, climate risk, and corporate sustainability research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, ESG & Sustainability Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, ESG & Sustainability Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-carbon-disclosure-project-public-climate-change-data?_ga=2.105318723.1326972826.1556550690-1266232307.1547737145)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
